name: IQ INTL AG  SF-,01
summary: iQ International AG develops, manufactures, and distributes lead-acid batteries for the automotive starting-lighting-ignition and storage markets in Europe, the Americas, Asia, and Africa. The company operates in two segments, Batteries and Licensing. It provides 360√Ç¬∞ electrolyte mixing batteries; licensing and technology consulting services; KinetiCharger, an anti-idle system for internal combustion engine vehicles; and HIVE, a power management system. iQ International AG is headquartered in Zug, Switzerland.
